stemHtml: Which of the following statements concerning the core of a polar front jet stream is correct?

options.a: It lies in the warm air; its pressure surfaces are horizontal at the height of the core.
options.b: It and its surface projection lie in the warm air.
options.c: It lies at a height where there is no horizontal temperature gradient; the slope of the pressure surfaces at the height of the core is at its maximum.
options.d: It lies in the cold air; the thermal wind reverses direction at the height of the core.
